actual_questions: What was the business purpose of this meal? (e.g., client entertainment, employee working meal, team meeting, business travel meal, or other)
Was this meal consumed while traveling for business, or at/near the regular place of work?
hard_27_meal_purpose.reason: First question directly targets the ambiguity — business purpose determines which account. Second question adds useful tax-relevant detail. Both are business fact questions, not accounting knowledge.
